Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry to drag you along while I go shopping...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I was so busy searching through the books... I'm sorry if I ignored you, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}B-But even so! I notice how you're always so willing to help me, {f 4 1}-san![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I-It's my fault, isn't it? I didn't mean to make you feel guilty about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}This place has so many interesting books, I was having a bit of trouble deciding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 9 5 109}Really!? I, um... didn't think you'd be into that kind of thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}The classics aren't very entertaining, but I can respect what the authors were trying to accomplish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 9 5 109}I love manga too. My bookshelf is full of shojo manga.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I tend to get frustrated when the main character can't ask out the guy she likes. I think it's because I can relate to her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm actually not too familiar with that sort of thing... Not that it's uninteresting or anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I'm just clueless when it comes to fashion. I'm nothing like you, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I-I'm sorry. I'm not very good at carrying a conversation...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That makes sense... The Internet makes information so accessible these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}So it's kind of a waste of money to buy books, isn't it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...Oh, I'm sorry! This, um, probably isn't the best place to talk...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}The shop owners probably wouldn't want us standing here either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Is it boring for you to hang around with, um... someone like me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 13 9 5 109}O-Oh, what a relief. I've been so worried about that this entire time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I-I'm sorry! I didn't mean to waste your time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Wh-What? You're spending time with me even though you don't care?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}T-Today, I was able to, um, say what was on my mind to you, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...I want to stop being so afraid of everything, and I want to be able to talk to other people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}My homeroom teacher, Mr. Takenozuka... He gives me a lot of class-related tasks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}But I'm always so scared, that all I can do is nod...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_023_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you only like this with guys?

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Well... It's not much of a story, but... my dad is a very scary person.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I'm not living with him anymore, but I can still remember the face he made when he got mad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}So... whenever I see a man now, all I can think of is that face...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Oh, no! I'm really happy that you care. Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro seems to appreciate my company.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Ah... I should get going. I'll see you at school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Chihiro, then[n]headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
